body.title: Deprecated → preferred pairs — the forms a plan must not propose
body.statement: Registry of deprecated forms and their preferred replacements. audit-precode checks each entry's 'deprecated' field against plan text; audit-smell checks the diff. A match is an AMEND naming the preferred form. Entries are added by decision or by a deprecation ticket; an entry is removed only when the deprecated form is purged from the tree (delete-after-successful-merge).

entries.deprecated: psycopg2.connect / raw psql for dev-process memory reads
entries.preferred: read the flat-file store (devlab/runtime/memory/, grep-able JSON)
entries.why: the palace DB is retired; a DB read path resurrects a dead source of truth
direct writes bypass the logging/trust chokepoint
print bypasses the canonical per-device log hierarchy

entries.deprecated: new MemoryType enum value / new memory table or store
entries.preferred: metadata tag or body field on the existing envelope
entries.why: rules/memory: distinctions become tags, schemas are fissive

entries.preferred: build to intent + a go-live-when ticket
entries.why: rules/igor-constraints: dead switches read as live capability

entries.deprecated: IMAP / IMAPServer as the bus transport
entries.why: IMAP is fully removed; poll loops via PgBus.fetch_unseen (T-imap-references-purge)
flat root logs are ungreppable; T-per-device-log-hierarchy
retired paths; the path-moves monitor alarms on them
renamed; /decided is the old wrong name

entries.preferred: Granny handshake (availability flag + bus routing + shim ACK)
entries.why: no claim, no launch — pure handshake; spawn paths violate the dispatch model

entries.deprecated: cc_queue.py next / cc_queue.py list to pick work
entries.why: the queue abstraction will switch to the ADC rack device; list also hides tickets

body.why: Deprecated forms are how purged debt regrows: each pair pins the direction of a completed (or in-flight) migration so a fresh plan can't innocently propose the dead form. The registry is the machine-readable half of every 'X is retired' decision.
